title: View Engines (Module 2) Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of the use of Partials and Layouts for code reuse, passing data to views via res.render, and the SEO benefits of SSR.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily role of a 'View Engine' in a professional Express application?
options: To combine HTML templates with dynamic data (like a user's name or product list) from the server to generate final HTML pages.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: The reusable pieces of HTML (like navigation bars or footers) that can be included on multiple pages are called ________.
Which method in the 'res' object is used in Express to render a template and send the final HTML back to the client?
Is Server-Side Rendering (SSR) better for SEO than client-side-only rendering?
options: Yes, as search engine crawlers can easily read the fully-rendered HTML sent by the server.

questions.question: In the 'res.render()' method, where do you place the data that the template should use?
options: As a JavaScript object in the second argument of the method.
As a string in the first argument.
